name: Austin
industries: Software and semiconductors, EV manufacturing and a maturing startup ecosystem drive an agile-leaning project market.
intro: Austin turned itself into a first-tier tech city in a decade: Tesla's gigafactory, Apple's second-largest campus, Oracle's headquarters and a startup scene that kept its slacker-city creativity while adding enterprise scale. Delivery roles here skew agile — Scrum credentials are effectively assumed in the software economy — while the hardware and manufacturing build-out adds classical program management demand. Austin employers hire nationally and screen on credentials. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for Austin: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact Austin timing is listed in the schedule below. Whatever the schedule, the format holds: one weekend, live instruction, exam application support, mocks, and trainer access until you're certified.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Austin?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CT, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CDT in Austin. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Austin?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Austin. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from United States?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in United States and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Austin sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in United States accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Austin — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Austin: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
